productDisplayName: Puma Unisex K9 Grey Yellow Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in the K9 floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Knit fabric straps on the forefoot and around ankles for comfort and protection Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for tightening Diagonal fabric strap attached to the ankle straps, from the forefoot strap Ankle straps padded lightly to avoid shoe bites Midsole Cushioned foam footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directional grooves for superior grip and traction Shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
